title: NoCrystalPVP
description: Disable crystal pvp, crystals and anchots
body:
A plug-and-play lightweight mod for Fabric servers! Fully server-side supported.

This mod prevents placing **End Crystals** as well as **Respawn Anchors**, flawlessly blocking any sweaty players.

Join my server (which has this mod): https://dc.creamcake.eu
